CONTEXT: - User handle: whodaniel - Zo Space URL base: https://whodaniel.zo.space - User's GitHub: github.com/whodaniel Build these 3 routes: 1. LANDING PAGE at update_space_route path="/content-engine" route_type="page" public=True - Hero: "Turn 1 Piece of Content Into 10" headline - Subhead: "Podcast, video, or article → LinkedIn posts, Twitter threads, email newsletters, quote graphics, video scripts" - How it works: Paste content → AI transforms → Download/Publish - Format showcase grid: LinkedIn Posts, Twitter Threads, Email Sequences, Quote Graphics, Video Scripts, Blog Posts, Newsletter Snippets, TikTok Scripts - Demo section: Show a real before/after example - Pricing: $39/month, 5 content inputs; $79/month unlimited - CTA: "Try Free for 3 Days" Import from lucide-react: Layers, Twitter, Linkedin, Mail, Image, Video, FileText, MessageSquare, Zap, ArrowRight, Check 2. DEMO API at update_space_route path="/api/content-engine/demo" route_type="api" public=True - Accept POST with {content: string, contentType: "article"|"podcast"|"video"} - Return structured JSON with 8 repurposed formats: twitter_thread: array of 5 tweets linkedin_post: a long-form LinkedIn post email_snippet: 150-word email teaser quote_graphics: array of 3 pull quotes video_script: 60-second script blog_post: 800-word blog outline newsletter_text: newsletter-ready paragraph tiktok_script: hook + 3 scenes - Use realistic sample data since this is a demo - Return {success: true, formats: {...}} 3. DEMO PAGE at update_space_route path="/content-engine/demo" route_type="page" public=True - Textarea to paste content - Dropdown to select content type - "Repurpose My Content" button that calls the demo API - Show results in tabbed interface (one tab per format) - Clean, dark-themed UI (bg-zinc-900) - Each result should be copyable with a copy button Write complete working code.
